# Broken Links Fixture

This document intentionally includes broken targets so tests can pin the
`link_debt_score` and broken-count values.

- [Missing file](./does-not-exist.md)
- [Missing anchor](#nowhere)
- [Stale reference][stale]
- Bare generic text: [click here](https://example.com).

## See Also

Nothing here, but the heading creates an anchor named `see-also`.
